scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 15 artifact directory with the repository schema validator.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-15` passed decision.json, feedback-digest.json, test-results.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, and review.md.

scenarios.name: Scenario difficulty validation
scenarios.description: Scenario at 100/15/gardenHealth 5. Wave 1 focused on lane 2; Glass Ram at wave 2 event index 4 inside 8-event lookahead forces triple-stack. All Glass Rams in lane 2 only.
scenarios.details: Wave 1 concentrated to 4 events in lanes 2+3, Glass Ram moved to wave 2 first event (event index 4) inside 8-event lookahead. Heuristic triple-stacks lane 2 before spreading — full coverage at placement 7 vs threshold 6, so simpleLaneCoverageWin=false. All Glass Rams confined to lane 2 across waves 2-4 (scripted only, excluded from unlocks). Runtime probe now strictly blocking by default; --allow-probe-timeout for local dev. Awaiting `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-15` exit 0.

scenarios.name: Sunroot targeted Playwright coverage
scenarios.description: Ran the Sunroot, roster asset, and April 14 alias test subset.
scenarios.details: 9 targeted tests passed covering Sunroot boot, inventory, asset validation, projectile suppression, and April 14 alias behavior.

scenarios.name: Full Playwright suite
scenarios.description: Ran the full UI/UX test suite with `npm run test:uiux`.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux` passed 356 tests with 0 failures. Covers title-scene timing fix, challenge resource reset to 100, inventory state, tutorial-to-challenge transition, and all existing regression tests.
